response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their immune system reacts to the proteins in peanuts  
the reaction causes an immediate release of chemicals that trigger inflammation and swelling in the body  
the body's response is a natural defense mechanism that is not related to the environment  

Sec. 2  
the immune system is designed to protect the body from harmful substances  
the reaction is a protective response to foreign substances that the body recognizes as threats  
the body's response is a natural process that is not influenced by external factors
